input_dict.question: What is the nationality of UFOlogist who is credited with being among the first to claim contact with Nordic aliens in the mid 1950s?
input_dict.source_summary: George Adamski was Polish American. Passage [1] corroborates this, explicitly calling him a "Polish American citizen" who claimed to have met "Nordic alien Space Brothers."
input_dict.target_summary: Summary: Bridge entity George Adamski is the UFOlogist credited with being among the first to claim contact with Nordic aliens in the mid-1950s (summary_1). The George Adamski page (sent_id 0) states: "George Adamski (17 April 1891 – 23 April 1965) was a Polish American citizen who became widely known in ufology circles ... after he claimed to have photographed spaceships from other planets, met with friendly Nordic alien Space Brothers, and to have taken flights with them to the Moon and other planets." Retain the exact fact that the George Adamski article identifies him as a "Polish American citizen" alongside the evidence linking him to Nordic alien contact; these points are needed by the final-answer agent.
input_dict.candidate_summary: George Adamski was a Polish American. Passage [1] states he was a 'Polish American citizen' who met 'Nordic alien Space Brothers'.
